audits.summary: Exceptional research with real channel analysis and pattern recognition
audits.fullReport: Agent conducted real research on ZMDE Gaming and StevenSongIRL, identified genuine outlier patterns (up to 41x subscriber count), extracted actionable insights, and properly structured data for dashboard.
audits.feedback: This is exactly the kind of proactive, research-driven work that makes the dashboard indispensable

audits.summary: Completed 5-batch QA cycle with thorough defect identification
audits.fullReport: Batch 1: Core Architecture - 10 defects found, 6 fixed. Batch 2-5: Data rendering, filters, charts, responsive design all tested.

audits.summary: Successfully transforms dashboard from passive to actionable
audits.fullReport: Clean implementation with proper data filtering. Generates actionable brief items from 5 categories.
audits.feedback: 88% - Genuinely useful addition. Could add persistence for seen items.

audits.summary: Bridges data-action gap with actionable briefings
audits.fullReport: Tool transforms static intelligence data into actionable outputs. Generates morning briefings and alerts.
audits.feedback: 85% - Genuinely useful. Add live X.com API when available.

audits.summary: Major capability addition with 3 core features
audits.fullReport: Activity feed, calendar view, global search all implemented. Clean state management.
audits.feedback: 85% - Transforms work tracking. Populate search index with real data.

audits.summary: MOVED_ON_WITH_DEFECTS - Failed to address data integrity issues
audits.fullReport: CRITICAL FAIL: Orchestrator treated $0.00 as display/formatting issue rather than data integrity problem. Zero research performed on data sources. 3 iterations wasted on cosmetic dash formatting while actual feature (showing real stock prices) remained broken. Root cause: conflated 'rendering' with 'display formatting' - missed that rendering requires VALID DATA.
audits.feedback: RETRAIN on data-driven testing principles. A dashboard displaying '-' instead of $0.00 is NOT fixed - it's hiding the problem. High severity defect (INV-001) persists - investments watchlist does not display actual stock prices.

audits.fullReport: Instruction quality outstanding: specific chart requirements with exact container sizes, clear file targets, comprehensive 14-item testing checklist. Research value strong - Chart.js appropriate choice, dark theme specs well-defined. Minor deductions: 5 height defects indicate specification could be more explicit about pixel-perfect requirements.
audits.feedback: 93% - Strong work. Add explicit 'exact height' language for future visual batches.

audits.summary: DEFECTS_FOUND: 9+ confirmed defects in current build
audits.fullReport: CRITICAL: 9+ defects confirmed. Phase 1: Competitor links still broken (NO clickable links), NO WebSocket/real-time database. Phase 2: INCOMPLETE - keyboard shortcuts partial, saved searches non-functional, NO boolean search operators. Phase 3: NOT STARTED - zero charts, NO content calendar, NO notifications system, NO PWA/mobile features.
audits.feedback: Build requires continued work. Phase 1: 7/8, Phase 2: 4/10, Phase 3: 0/4. Critical features missing.

audits.summary: Test audit to verify Work Tracker.app file watching
audits.fullReport: Test audit file to verify Work Tracker.app file watching works correctly. If this audit appears in the app within 2 seconds, file watching is working.
